title: Keto German Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful keto stew made with traditional german ingredients, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: 1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy.
2. Remove the bacon from the pot and set aside.
3. Add the sausage to the pot and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
4. Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
5. Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Add the stew tomatoes, beef broth, and cooked bacon to the pot.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired.
